## Current project information
- Framework: Next.js (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + custom global styles
- Page implemented: One-page LP top page for Para Sonho / パラソーニョ
- Main focus: Hero, service overview, plans, features, pricing image, FAQ, contact CTA
